allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
refactor!: rewrite as pure Claude Code plugin

Replace the Node.js CLI implementation with a native Claude Code plugin
using slash commands and shell scripts. This simplifies the architecture
and removes external dependencies.

Changes:
- Add `/project:fly` slash command for workflow orchestration
- Add shell scripts for git sync, validation, PR management, and notifications
- Add settings.json with pre-approved permissions and hooks
- Update README with comprehensive installation and usage docs
- Improve sync-branch.sh with auto-stash, timeouts, and better error handling

Removed:
- Node.js CLI (bin/maverick.mjs)
- Workflow engine (src/workflow.mjs, src/workflows/)
- Step implementations (src/steps/)
- Task parser (src/tasks/)
- Tests and fixtures
- package.json and dependencies

BREAKING CHANGE: No longer a standalone CLI. Now installs as files in
your project''s .claude/ directory and runs via Claude Code slash commands.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
